stt.heardError: Sàr man, naśti te aśunav tut. Mangav tumen te zumaven pale.
stt.micAccessError: Nashti te resel pes o mikrofono. Dikh e permisie.

error.loadFailed: Naśti te ćhivel pes o avatar: {{error}}
error.passwordRequired: Trubul o parovipen vaś o .ania lil kriptime
error.noSource: Na si dino o źanglipe vaś o avatar (avatarUrl vaj avatarData)

greetings.0: Bachtalo! Sar shaj zhutiv tut adyes?
greetings.1: So keres! Miśto avilăn! So daștiv te kerav tuke?
greetings.2: So keres! But bahtalo te dav duma tusa!
greetings.3: So keres! Me sem kate te zhutiv. So trubul tut?
greetings.4: So keres! So keres? Sar śaj te avav laćho?
